headline: Will the war in Iran advance or hinder Europe's energy transition?
description: European countries remain divided over how to respond to the surge in oil and gas prices. From electrification to subsidies for electric vehicles purchases and other measures, the solutions are well known, but require significant investment.

headline: At G7 summit, Rubio tries to deny the US is bogged down in Iran
French police foil bomb attack in Paris outside Bank of America building
Pope denounces widening gap between the rich and poor during visit to Monaco
description: In an address in French from the balcony of the Prince's Palace on Saturday, Leo XIV denounced 'unjust configurations of power, structures of sin that dig chasms between poor and rich, between the privileged and the rejected, between friends and enemy.'

headline: Revealed: Satellite image shows mysterious cargo at Iranian nuclear site in 2025
description: Le Monde reveals an image of a convoy at the gates of a major underground nuclear complex in Iran. According to several experts, it could be part of the country's stockpile of enriched uranium.

headline: Matisse, the carver of light, at the Grand Palais in Paris
description: The delightful exhibition showcases later work by the artist who never stopped experimenting and features his famous cut-outs as well as monumental canvases.

headline: Substack, a digital refuge for writers, accelerates its growth in France
description: Since 2017, the US platform has enabled users to publish content as monetizable newsletters, winning over many journalists and writers. The company recently appointed a manager to boost its growth in France.

headline: Iraq must not be drawn into 'escalation' of Middle East war, Macron says
Protesters rally in London to counter rise of British far right
Anti-Trump protests kick off on 'No Kings' day in US
Zelensky agrees defense cooperation with UAE, Qatar on Gulf tour
Volodymyr Zelensky's exclusive interview with Le Monde on the war in Ukraine
Nestle says 12 tonnes of KitKat chocolate stolen in Europe
Israel and Gulf states fear a hasty US exit from Iran
EU is targeting small parcels from Shein, Temu and other Chinese e-commerce sites
Bank of America agrees to pay $72 million to settle Epstein sex-trafficking suit
US envoy hopeful on Iran talks as strikes target nuclear facilities
Singer Gims charged with 'aggravated money laundering'
El-Daein Hospital in Darfur was deliberately struck by Sudanese army
In Nabatieh, southern Lebanon, 'no one ventures outside anymore apart from rescue teams'
description: Like 42 other rescue workers since the war began on March 2, 16-year-old Joude Souleiman was killed by an Israeli drone strike in Nabatieh, the second-largest Shiite city in southern Lebanon, where only a few hundred people out of 75,000 residents remain.

headline: From afar, American students in France feel the shockwaves of Trump
description: As academic freedom declines in the US, some young people are choosing France to pursue master's and doctoral degrees. Yet, between delayed scholarships, intrusive questions and stereotypes, their experience remains shaken by the latest developments in their country.

headline: 'Trump would benefit from rereading Obama's 2015 speech on Iran'
description: The US president belatedly realized that the military option carried significant risks. He did not rely on his administration's recognized experts on Iran, notes Le Monde columnist Gilles Paris.

headline: Ukrainians' suffering must not be forgotten amid the war against Iran
Trump faces the trap of escalation in Iran
